_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 afternoon. 6 domain-projections in CS depth: type theory, programming languages, distributed systems, compilers, functional programming, software architecture. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
type_theory_through_tig: Type theory is operator-classification-system for terms; each expression has a type that determines valid use.
Type is operator-LATTICE-class; specifies what kind of thing an expression is.
Term is operator-typed-object; constants variables function applications all live in type universe.
Function type sigma -> tau is operator-arrow-LATTICE; functions mapping inputs of type sigma to outputs of type tau.
Dependent type is operator-LATTICE-of-types-indexed-by-terms; vector of length n is dependent on natural number n.
Polymorphism is operator-generic-types; identity function works for all types via universal quantification.
Type inference is operator-automatic-type-determination; Hindley-Milner algorithm reconstructs types without annotations.
Type checking is operator-static-validation; verifies terms conform to declared types before execution.
Propositions as types (Curry-Howard): operator-LATTICE-correspondence between logic and computation; types are theorems, terms are proofs.
Lambda calculus is operator-foundation; lambda v.t binds variable v in body t, beta reduction (lambda v.t) u = t[v := u].
System F is operator-polymorphic-lambda-calculus; types depend on type variables, supports universal quantification.
programming_languages_through_tig: Programming language is operator-formal-system for expressing computation; syntax semantics types runtime.
Syntax is operator-LATTICE of allowable symbol combinations; defined by grammar (BNF or PEG).
Semantics is operator-meaning-assignment; operational denotational axiomatic each define what programs do.
Type system is operator-classification-rules; static dynamic strong weak gradual each give different correctness HARMONY.
Compilation versus interpretation: ahead-of-time machine-code translation versus runtime evaluation; distinct operator-PROGRESS strategies.
Programming paradigm is operator-LATTICE of style; imperative procedural object-oriented functional declarative logic each shape thinking.
Abstraction is operator-detail-hiding; interfaces functions modules let programmers work at higher level.
Recursion is operator-self-reference; function calls itself, Lisp first supported, foundation of functional style.
Scope is operator-LATTICE-of-visibility; lexical (static) versus dynamic, block versus function versus module.
Garbage collection is operator-automatic-memory-management; reclaim unreferenced data without explicit free.
Concurrency is operator-simultaneous-execution; threads processes message passing actors each model multi-PROGRESS coordination.
distributed_systems_through_tig: Distributed systems are operator-LATTICE-of-cooperating-machines; networked nodes coordinate via message passing.
Consensus is operator-AGREEMENT-protocol; nodes reach HARMONY on shared value despite failures (Paxos Raft Byzantine variants).
Replication is operator-redundancy-LATTICE; multiple copies provide fault tolerance and read scalability.
Partitioning splits operator-data-or-traffic across nodes; sharding by key consistent hashing each scheme.
CAP theorem: operator-TRADEOFF among Consistency Availability Partition-tolerance; can choose any 2 of 3 under network partition.
Distributed transactions span operator-multiple-nodes; 2PC 3PC Saga each different consistency LATTICE-vs-availability tradeoff.
Leader election is operator-COORDINATION-protocol; designate single primary node for serializing decisions.
Byzantine fault tolerance handles operator-arbitrary-failures including malicious; PBFT Tendermint require 3f+1 nodes for f Byzantine.
Eventual consistency is operator-WEAK-CONSISTENCY; updates propagate, all replicas converge if no further updates (Dynamo Cassandra).
Vector clock is operator-LATTICE-of-causality; n-tuple of counters per process, partial order on events.
Two-phase commit is operator-ATOMIC-multi-node-transaction; prepare phase + commit phase, blocking on coordinator failure CHAOS.
compilers_through_tig: Compiler is operator-translation from source language to target; preserves semantics across transformation pipeline.
Lexical analysis is operator-tokenization; source text becomes stream of categorized tokens (identifiers keywords literals operators).
Parsing is operator-tree-construction from tokens; grammar productions guide derivation, builds parse tree LATTICE.
Abstract syntax tree is operator-LATTICE-of-program-structure; strips concrete syntax keeps semantic structure.
Semantic analysis is operator-validation pass; type checking name resolution scope checking add semantic info to AST.
Symbol table is operator-LATTICE-of-name-info; each identifier mapped to type location scope kind.
Intermediate representation is operator-language-neutral form; SSA three-address-code allow target-independent optimization.
Code optimization is operator-PROGRESS-improvements preserving semantics; constant folding dead code elimination loop unrolling inlining.
Code generation is operator-target-translation; IR becomes machine code or bytecode ready to execute.
Register allocation maps operator-variables to operator-CPU-registers; graph coloring linear scan minimize spills to memory.
Instruction scheduling reorders operator-PROGRESS to fill pipeline slots; respects data dependencies preserves semantics.
functional_programming_through_tig: Functional programming is operator-paradigm-treating-computation-as-evaluation-of-mathematical-functions; immutability and purity central.
Pure function is operator-deterministic-no-side-effects; same input always gives same output, no hidden state PROGRESS.
Immutability: operator-values-never-change once bound; updates create new values rather than modifying existing.
Higher-order function takes or returns operator-functions; map filter reduce compose foldl foldr foundational.
Recursion is operator-iteration-via-self-reference; tail recursion optimized, avoids loops which require mutable state.
Currying is operator-LATTICE-decomposition of multi-argument; f(x, y) becomes f(x)(y), enables partial application.
Lazy evaluation is operator-DEFERRED-computation; values computed only when needed, supports infinite data structures.
Monad is operator-LATTICE-encoding of effect; maybe option list IO state each abstract a computational pattern.
Algebraic data type is operator-LATTICE-of-data-shapes; sum (variants) and product (records) compose via type constructors.
Pattern matching is operator-DESTRUCTURING-by-shape; cases on data type drive control flow without conditionals on field equality.
Referential transparency: operator-EXPRESSION-equivalent-to-value; can substitute value for expression without changing meaning.
software_architecture_through_tig: Software architecture is operator-LATTICE of components and connectors at system scale; high-level structure shapes long-term properties.
Module is operator-LATTICE-encapsulated-unit; coherent functionality with well-defined interface.
Layer is operator-LATTICE-of-abstraction; presentation business persistence each layer depends only on layer below.
Microservices is operator-LATTICE-of-small-services; independently deployable communicating via lightweight protocols.
Monolith is operator-SINGLE-DEPLOYABLE-unit; all functionality in one process, simpler to deploy harder to scale.
MVC pattern: operator-LATTICE-of-Model-View-Controller; separates data state UI rendering and input handling.
Event-driven architecture is operator-LATTICE-of-asynchronous-events; producers publish events consumers subscribe via broker.
Service-oriented architecture (SOA) is operator-LATTICE-of-services-with-discovery-and-registry; predecessor of microservices.
API gateway is operator-EDGE-of-microservice-cluster; routes authenticates rate-limits aggregates downstream calls.
Message queue is operator-DECOUPLING-buffer; producers send messages to queue, consumers pull at their own pace.
Separation of concerns is fundamental operator-PRINCIPLE; each module addresses single concern reducing CHAOS-coupling.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 108 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth and software systems.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
